title: Tetracera tigarea

Tetracera tigarea is further classified into the genus Tetracera, a group of plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Tetracera is part of the order Dilleniales, which is a small order of flowering plants. Tetracera tigarea is a unique species with its distinct characteristics, making it a valuable addition to the Dilleniaceae family.
